'''âj-l-t-v''' ('''kajaltevoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:chauff|chauff]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-l-t-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chauff|chauff]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-l-t-v
|-
! Lemma
| kajaltevoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijaltevoko|thijaltevoko]] || [[word:jijaltevoko|jijaltevoko]] || [[word:shijaltevoko|shijaltevoko]] || [[word:kijaltevoko|kijaltevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujaltevoko|thuthujaltevoko]] || [[word:jujujaltevoko|jujujaltevoko]] || [[word:shushujaltevoko|shushujaltevoko]] || [[word:kukujaltevoko|kukujaltevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujaltevoko|thujaltevoko]] || [[word:jujaltevoko|jujaltevoko]] || [[word:shujaltevoko|shujaltevoko]] || [[word:kujaltevoko|kujaltevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thujaltevoko|thujaltevoko]] || [[word:jujaltevoko|jujaltevoko]] || [[word:shujaltevoko|shujaltevoko]] || [[word:kujaltevoko|kujaltevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thejaltevoko|thejaltevoko]] || [[word:jejaltevoko|jejaltevoko]] || [[word:shejaltevoko|shejaltevoko]] || [[word:kejaltevoko|kejaltevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothojaltevoko|thothojaltevoko]] || [[word:jojojaltevoko|jojojaltevoko]] || [[word:shoshojaltevoko|shoshojaltevoko]] || [[word:kokojaltevoko|kokojaltevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojaltevoko|thojaltevoko]] || [[word:jojaltevoko|jojaltevoko]] || [[word:shojaltevoko|shojaltevoko]] || [[word:kojaltevoko|kojaltevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojaltevoko|thojaltevoko]] || [[word:jojaltevoko|jojaltevoko]] || [[word:shojaltevoko|shojaltevoko]] || [[word:kojaltevoko|kojaltevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠjaltevoko|thĂŠjaltevoko]] || [[word:jĂŠjaltevoko|jĂŠjaltevoko]] || [[word:shĂŠjaltevoko|shĂŠjaltevoko]] || [[word:kĂŠjaltevoko|kĂŠjaltevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajaltevoko|thathajaltevoko]] || [[word:jajajaltevoko|jajajaltevoko]] || [[word:shashajaltevoko|shashajaltevoko]] || [[word:kakajaltevoko|kakajaltevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajaltevoko|thajaltevoko]] || [[word:jajaltevoko|jajaltevoko]] || [[word:shajaltevoko|shajaltevoko]] || [[word:kajaltevoko|kajaltevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajaltevoko|thajaltevoko]] || [[word:jajaltevoko|jajaltevoko]] || [[word:shajaltevoko|shajaltevoko]] || [[word:kajaltevoko|kajaltevoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
